overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring featuring a player character in a distinctive fur cloak ascending the stone staircases of a massive gothic cathedral under an apocalyptic crimson sky. The character transitions through dark interior corridors and emerges into a vast domed hall with ornate architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide stone staircase toward the cathedral entrance

entered.detail: massive stone cathedral with tall gothic windows and ornate architectural details
broad stone stairs with ornate black metal railings
decorative metal railings with stone posts lining the staircase
crimson sky filled with floating embers and dark storm clouds
patches of snow on the ground beside the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand exterior staircase of a gothic cathedral under an apocalyptic red sky. The massive stone facade looms ahead with tall windows, while ornate railings line the snow-dusted steps.

events.description: character enters dark interior through large stone archway
ambient light drops significantly as character moves into the unlit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow dark corridor illuminated by sparse wall-mounted chandeliers

entered.detail: narrow stone hallway with minimal lighting and smooth marble floors
ornate candelabra mounted on stone walls providing dim flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark interior corridor where the red sky disappears from view. The space is dimly lit by ornate wall-mounted chandeliers as the character moves through the narrow stone passage toward a distant light.

events.description: character exits dark interior back to exterior staircase
red apocalyptic sky becomes visible again as character emerges from darkness

agents.ego_description: climbing the final exterior staircase toward the main cathedral entrance

entered.detail: broad stone steps leading up to the cathedral entrance with ornate railings
ornate gothic facade with multiple arches and tall columns
single tree with orange autumn leaves beside the staircase
crimson sky with floating embers visible above the structure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor onto a rear exterior staircase, where the apocalyptic red sky is visible again. The character ascends toward an ornate cathedral entrance, passing a solitary autumn tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral nave with domed ceiling

events.description: character enters the vast cathedral interior through large archway
interior space illuminated by warm chandelier light and red glow from tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive cathedral interior toward the far end with large arched windows

entered.detail: vast hall with massive stone columns and intricate gothic architecture
ornate circular dome with detailed ribbed architecture high above
large gothic windows at the far end showing the red sky outside
tall ornate candelabra with multiple candles lighting the floor
intricate circular stone tile pattern covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast cathedral interior with a high domed ceiling and massive pillars. The space is illuminated by floor candelabras and the red glow filtering through tall arched windows at the far end, revealing intricate patterns on the marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a gothic cathedral, transitioning from an apocalyptic exterior into dark corridors and finally into a vast, illuminated sanctuary. It begins on a grand exterior staircase under a crimson sky, moving past ornate railings and snow-dusted stone toward the massive facade. As the character enters the building, the red light vanishes, replaced by the dim glow of wall-mounted chandeliers within a narrow stone passage. The scene then shifts back outdoors onto a rear staircase where the red sky reappears, leading the character past a solitary autumn tree toward a secondary entrance. Finally, the camera emerges into a massive domed interior where the red glow filters through tall arched windows, illuminating marble floors and towering pillars.
